elected, then "Accept cookies from sites" should be selected. Still trouble logging in? Check that the clock and timezone are set correctly on your computer. An incorrect timezone setting can cause your login cookie to be created with an expiration

our login cookie to be created with an expiration time that has already passed. If this happens, your username and password will be accepted, but the next page you see will probably tell you you are not logged in. Contact ©2002-2018 U.C. Regents
